name: poe2-toolkit
description: Framework-agnostic toolkit for Path of Exile 2 data: a shared GGPK access layer plus extractors and renderers for the passive tree (items and gems in progress). Code only — ships no game data or art.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @poe2/ggpk && npm run build -w @poe2-tree/core && npm run build -w @poe2-tree/react && npm run build -w @poe2-tree/extractor && npm run build -w @poe2-item/extractor && npm run build -w @poe2-gem/extractor
scripts.ci: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
